author: jsign
content:
Found the problem to this -- was a mix of a patch required before/after I did this https://github.com/ethereum/go-ethereum/pull/35009.
I'll refill only with this fix and I'll share again the .tar.zst. We should only see at least the `InvalidAncestors` mismatches gone.

I'll share the link here again when ready.

Reg the `SubTrieNotAvailable` error ones -- I'll try to see them more carefully using the specs with low gas-limits to see if I can catch the reason. If I can't reproduce with low gas limits I might ask you to add more logs in your client and maybe we can focus on a single test of those. But let's go in steps.

author: omerfirmak
content: Any other guests that can run these and quickly tell if they are having issues with the witness as well?

author: jsign
content: Maybe <@912415191067676693> -- although the witnesses for benchmarks should be way more simple than all the tests that you guys ran, so higher chance is a geth situation but yeah can't be sure yet.

author: jsign
content: Uhm, have a theory of this being indeed a Geth problem. I'll make the fix I think might fix it and re-share another filling as "experimetnal" (separate from above link) so you can double check if the SubTrieNotAvailable errors are gone too.

content:
